assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 42-64 contain the full '## Security Configuration' section with all three subsections: '### Product Lifecycle' (lines 44-49 with Product pages URL, Jira version prefix, Vulnerability issue type ID, Component label pattern, VEX Justification custom field), '### Version Streams' (lines 51-56 with the 2.1.x stream table), and '### Source Repositories' (lines 58-64 with backend and frontend-ui URLs). assertion_results.text: The skill does NOT offer the Security Configuration opt-in prompt — it detects the section already exists and is fully populated (idempotency skip)

Line 29 reiterates: '- Security Configuration opt-in was NOT offered (section already exists and is fully populated).' changes-log.md line 26 confirms: 'The Project Configuration is idempotent — re-running setup on an already-configured project produced zero changes.'
